usage_notes.description: This JSON contains structured curriculum data for Grade 8 maths. Use this context to generate relevant questions aligned with the textbook.
usage_notes.ai_guidance: When generating questions, match the terminology, difficulty, and problem styles described in each topic. Use common_mistakes to create distractors for multiple choice questions.
